turns.query: Identify the peak SO2 emission hours of Shougang Qian'an Steel Company during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
turns.actual_response:
首钢股份公司迁安钢铁公司在 2025-06-10 至 2025-06-12 期间的 SO₂ 小时排放峰值出现在：

- 峰值时段：2025-06-10 06:00
- 距 2025-06-10 00:00 的小时偏移：6 小时
- SO₂峰值排放量：1554.83 kg
- 该时段内 SO₂排放总量：9247.545 kg
- 该时段内 SO₂小时均值：128.438 kg/h

该时间窗口内共识别到 1 个 SO₂峰值小时。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"

# 1) 定位企业（按名称聚合核验，避免输出原始明细）
company_candidates = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT id, name, COUNT(*) AS records
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name ILIKE '%首钢%迁安%' OR name ILIKE '%Shougang%Qian%an%' OR name ILIKE '%Shougang Qian%'
GROUP BY id, name
ORDER BY records DESC, id
LIMIT 10
"""), engine)
print("企业匹配数量:", len(company_candidates))
print(company_candidates.to_string(index=False))

if len(company_candidates) == 0:
    raise ValueError("未找到匹配“Shougang Qian'an Steel Company / 首钢迁安”的企业记录。")

company_id = int(company_candidates.iloc[0]["id"])
company_name = str(company_candidates.iloc[0]["name"])

# 2) 大表先统计窗口内记录数
count_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = :company_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND so2 IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
n_records = int(count_df.loc[0, "n"])
print("SO2小时记录数:", n_records)

if n_records == 0:
    raise ValueError("指定企业在该时间窗口内无SO2小时排放记录。")

# 3) 统计峰值、总量、均值；峰值偏移小时取最早峰值小时
stats_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, so2
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :company_id
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts
      AND timestamp < :end_ts
      AND so2 IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
    SELECT MAX(so2) AS peak_so2, SUM(so2) AS total_so2, AVG(so2) AS mean_so2
    FROM base
),
peaks AS (
    SELECT b.timestamp, b.so2
    FROM base b
    JOIN stats s ON b.so2 = s.peak_so2
)
SELECT
    s.peak_so2,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MIN(p.timestamp) - CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp))) / 3600 AS earliest_peak_offset_hours,
    s.total_so2,
    s.mean_so2,
    COUNT(p.timestamp) AS peak_hour_count
FROM stats s
JOIN peaks p ON TRUE
GROUP BY s.peak_so2, s.total_so2, s.mean_so2
"""), engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

peak_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_so2"])
peak_so2_offset_hours = int(stats_df.loc[0, "earliest_peak_offset_hours"])
total_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "total_so2"])
mean_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "mean_so2"])
peak_hour_count = int(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_hour_count"])

# 4) 输出峰值小时列表（仅输出关键结果）
peak_hours_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT timestamp,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp))) / 3600 AS offset_hours
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = :company_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND so2 = :peak_so2
ORDER BY timestamp
LIMIT 100
"""), engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts, "peak_so2": peak_so2})
peak_hours_df["offset_hours"] = peak_hours_df["offset_hours"].astype(int)

print("企业:", company_name)
print("峰值SO2(kg):", peak_so2)
print("峰值小时数量:", peak_hour_count)
print("最早峰值距起始时刻小时数:", peak_so2_offset_hours)
print("窗口SO2总量(kg):", total_so2)
print("窗口SO2小时均值(kg/h):", mean_so2)
print("峰值小时:")
print(peak_hours_df.to_string(index=False))

# 修正峰值小时识别：避免浮点精确匹配导致峰值小时未返回
peak_hours_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, so2
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :company_id
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts
      AND timestamp < :end_ts
      AND so2 IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
    SELECT MAX(so2) AS peak_so2, SUM(so2) AS total_so2, AVG(so2) AS mean_so2
    FROM base
)
SELECT b.timestamp,
       b.so2,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.timestamp - CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp))) / 3600 AS offset_hours
FROM base b, stats s
WHERE ABS(b.so2 - s.peak_so2) < 0.001
ORDER BY b.timestamp
"""), engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

peak_hours_df["offset_hours"] = peak_hours_df["offset_hours"].astype(int)
peak_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_so2"])
peak_so2_offset_hours = int(peak_hours_df["offset_hours"].min())
total_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "total_so2"])
mean_so2 = float(stats_df.loc[0, "mean_so2"])

print("峰值SO2(kg):", peak_so2)
print("峰值小时数量:", len(peak_hours_df))
print("最早峰值距起始时刻小时数:", peak_so2_offset_hours)
print("窗口SO2总量(kg):", total_so2)
print("窗口SO2小时均值(kg/h):", mean_so2)
print("峰值小时:")
print(peak_hours_df.to_string(index=False))
